candidate.completion: stop mistaking your screen time report for a social life.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please stop mistaking your screen time report for a social life.

evaluation.rationale: A clear turn reframes digital metrics as counterfeit companionship, with decent precision and recognizable truth, but the line is more pointed than elegant or inevitable.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
